name: maiacpp
description: MaiaCpp (WebCpp): C++98 to C transpiler integrated with MaiaC.

scripts.ready:full: npm run ready:release && npm run check:stress:maiacpp && npm run check:dist:node && npm run check:dist:browser-host
scripts.ready:release: node ./compiler/tests/run_tiered_cpp98.js && node ./compiler/tests/run_fixtures.js --fixtures-dir ./compiler/tests/fixtures --parser ./compiler/cpp-compiler.js --mode compiler && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/test_cpp98_extended.cpp && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/401_namespace_overload.cpp && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/402_object_memory.cpp && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/403_using_directive.cpp && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/404_namespace_alias.cpp && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/405_pointer_cv.cpp && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/406_elaborated_type.cpp && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/407_abstract_declarator.cpp && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/408_control_flow.cpp && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/409_enum_specifier.cpp && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/410_declarations.cpp && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/411_conversion_operator_id.cpp && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/412_try_throw_catch.cpp && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/413_throw_expression.cpp && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/414_linkage_specification.cpp && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/415_asm_definition.cpp && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/416_explicit_instantiation.cpp && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/417_explicit_specialization.cpp && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/401_namespace_overload.cpp --runtime browser-host && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/402_object_memory.cpp --runtime browser-host && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/414_linkage_specification.cpp --runtime browser-host && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/415_asm_definition.cpp --runtime browser-host && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/416_explicit_instantiation.cpp --runtime browser-host && node ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.js --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/417_explicit_specialization.cpp --runtime browser-host
